title: Finances: Environment and Climate Change Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Finances: Environment and Climate Change Canada

### Quarterly financial reports
Year-to-date highlights, information on risks, and changes to operations, personnel and programs.

### Quarterly travel expenses
Mandatory publication of travel expenses for selected government officials.

### Quarterly hospitality expenses
Mandatory publication of hospitality expenses for selected government officials.

### Annual reports on travel, hospitality and conference expenses
Information on the annual expenditures for each of travel, hospitality and conference fees.
Disclosure of contracts valued over $10,000.

### Grants and contributions over $25K
Awarding of grants and contributions over $25,000.

### Unaudited Financial Statements
Accounting of department’s administration of its public financial affairs and resources.

### Future-Oriented Statements of Operations
These statements reflect the plans described in the Report on Plans and Priorities.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
